title: crotalaria polyphylla
intro: Crotalaria polyphylla, also known as the many-leaved rattlebox or many-leaved crotalaria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Crotalaria polyphylla include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections, making it a valuable herb in various cultures. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria polyphylla typically involve drying the leaves and roots, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
